requestStateNotes.pending: Your request is waiting for review before care chat can open.
requestStateNotes.approved: Care chat was approved. You can use the linked conversation while it stays active.
requestStateNotes.rejected: This request was not approved. Use support if you still need help.
requestStateNotes.expired: This request expired before care chat could stay available.
requestStateNotes.cancelled: This request was cancelled and care chat is not available from it anymore.
requestStateNotes.revoked: Care-chat access was revoked for this request.

conversationStateNotes.open: This approved care chat is active right now.
conversationStateNotes.pending: This conversation exists but is not fully active yet.
conversationStateNotes.closed: This care chat has been closed.
conversationStateNotes.expired: This care chat expired and no longer accepts new messages.
conversationStateNotes.suspended: This care chat is temporarily limited.

requestNotFound.heading: Care-chat request not found
requestNotFound.note: We could not find this care-chat request in the current workflow.

requestError.heading: Care-chat request is not available right now
requestError.note: Could not load this care-chat request right now.

conversationNotFound.heading: Conversation not found
conversationNotFound.note: We could not find this care-chat conversation in the current workflow.

conversationError.heading: Conversation is not available right now
conversationError.note: Could not load this care-chat conversation right now.

thread.heading: Conversation
thread.note: This chat stays limited to the approved care-chat flow.

empty.heading: No messages yet
empty.note: Messages will appear here once the approved care chat starts.

compose.heading: Send a message
compose.note: Keep the conversation focused on care follow-up within this approved flow.
compose.blockedNote: You cannot send a new message in this conversation right now.

items.approvalOnly: Care chat only opens after approval in the backend-supported workflow.
items.noGeneralChat: This is not a general chat product or open-ended messaging space.
items.sessionContext: When relevant, the request can stay tied to a real session context.

errors.activeRequestAlreadyExists: There is already an active care-chat request for this practitioner.
errors.requestNotFound: This care-chat request was not found.
errors.conversationNotFound: This care-chat conversation was not found.
errors.invalidLinkedSession: The linked session is not valid for this care-chat request.
errors.requestExpired: This care-chat request has already expired.
errors.invalidApprovalDecisionTransition: This request can no longer be approved or rejected from its current state.
errors.invalidRevokeTransition: This approved care-chat request cannot be revoked from its current state.
errors.conversationInactiveForSend: This care-chat conversation is not active for sending messages right now.
errors.patientProfileNotFound: Your patient profile could not be found.
errors.practitionerProfileNotFound: The practitioner profile could not be found.
errors.practitionerNotFound: We could not find that practitioner.
errors.generic: Could not complete this care-chat action right now.

meta.listDescription: Request care chat, track approval state, and continue approved care conversations.
meta.detailDescription: View care-chat request status and follow the approved next step.
meta.conversationDescription: Continue an approved care-chat conversation with clear boundaries.

home.title: Request care chat when it is approved for your care needs
home.note: Use this flow when you need bounded care follow-up with a practitioner. It stays approval-based and separate from general support or general chat.

create.heading: Start a care-chat request
create.note: Submit a request only when you have a real practitioner context for this care need.

fields.reason: Why do you need care chat?

placeholders.reason: Add a short reason for this request

create.helper: If this request is tied to a real session, add the session ID so the approval flow keeps the right care context.

list.heading: Your care-chat requests
list.note: Track approval state and continue only the conversations that were truly approved.

error.heading: Your care-chat requests are not available right now
error.note: Could not load your care-chat requests right now.

empty.heading: No care-chat requests yet
empty.note: Start with a real practitioner or session context when care chat is the right next step.

detail.title: Care-chat request with {name}
detail.conversationNote: This request now has an approved care-chat conversation. Use it while the conversation remains active.

meta.listDescription: Review patient care-chat requests and continue approved care conversations.
meta.detailDescription: Review the request state and open the linked approved conversation when available.
meta.conversationDescription: Continue approved care-chat conversations with clear workflow boundaries.

home.title: See approved and pending care-chat requests
home.note: This area shows only the approval-based care-chat flow. It is not a general messaging workspace.

list.heading: Care-chat requests
list.note: Review which patient requests are still pending, approved, or no longer available.

error.heading: Care-chat requests are not available right now
error.note: Could not load care-chat requests right now.

empty.heading: No care-chat requests right now
empty.note: Approved and pending care-chat requests will appear here when they exist.

detail.title: Care-chat request from {name}
detail.conversationNote: Open the linked conversation only while the approved care-chat flow stays active.

meta.listDescription: Review approval-based care-chat requests and manage the current bounded workflow.
meta.detailDescription: Approve, reject, or revoke care-chat requests within the current backend-supported workflow.
meta.conversationDescription: Read the approved care-chat conversation in a bounded, read-only admin view.

list.title: Care-chat approvals
list.note: Review patient-to-practitioner care-chat requests without turning this into a general chat product.
list.requestsNote: Focus on what is pending first, then inspect already decided requests when needed.

error.heading: Care-chat approvals are not available right now
error.note: Could not load the care-chat approval queue right now.

empty.heading: No care-chat approval work right now
empty.note: There are no requests in this queue right now.

detail.title: Care-chat request for {patient} with {practitioner}
detail.conversationNote: If this request already opened a conversation, you can inspect it in a read-only admin view.

approve.heading: Approve care chat
approve.note: Approve this request only when the bounded care-chat flow is valid for the current care context.
approve.notePlaceholder: Optional internal note for the approval decision

reject.heading: Do not approve
reject.note: Reject this request when care chat should not open from the current context.
reject.notePlaceholder: Optional internal note for the rejection decision

revoke.heading: Revoke care-chat access
revoke.note: Revoke only when an approved care-chat flow should no longer remain active.
revoke.notePlaceholder: Optional internal note for this revoke action

readOnly.heading: No approval action is available now
readOnly.note: This request is already in a terminal or read-only state for admin action.

conversation.readOnlyNote: This is a read-only admin view of the approved care-chat conversation.
